behavior_in_task_description.reason: instruction.md names GlobWalker.zig, setNameFilter, computeNtFilter, and the active BitSet — all identifiers tests reference.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the problem (old variable still referenced) and constraints but does not give the exact replacement code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: test_multi_active_branch_is_sane requires 'null' or '&[_]u16{}' (and the regex '&\[\]_u16\{\}' is actually malformed anyway), rejecting valid fixes that e.g. guard setNameFilter inside an if without an else-branch passing null.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Only test_globwalker_zig_compiles executes anything (and it skips if zig missing); the rest are regex/text inspections of the source.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests check removal of buggy pattern and presence of active/conditional — a stub cannot satisfy them without actually fixing.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover compilation, removal of buggy call, use of active, and handling the multi-active case as described.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped into named TestCompilation, TestBuggyPatternRemoved, TestFixDerivesIndexFromActiveBitSet, TestMultiActiveCaseHandled, TestPassToPass classes.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a code fix, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: The regex '&\[\]_u16\{\}' in test_multi_active_branch_is_sane is a typo — the Zig syntax is '&[_]u16{}', so the underscore placement is wrong and the regex will never match a real empty slice.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points at the file and function but not specific lines or the exact replacement; localization-level detail is appropriate.
